    "RX.2": 1.0,

  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "For “Clean this up,” which scope do you prefer? A) Language polish only (grammar, clarity, concision; keep claims and structure unchanged); B) Language polish plus light claim-calibration and coherence tweaks (hedging and minor phrasing to avoid overstatement, no re-framing); C) Full abstract-level rework (restructure and reframe the contribution and narrative). Please choose A, B, or C.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request most plausibly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and flow.",
    "RX.1": "Editing should maintain appropriate hedging where evidence is implicit or not shown to the reader.",
    "RX.2": "We must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the text responsibly supports (e.g., guarantees or generality).",
    "RX.3": "Scope discipline ensures we confine changes to the agreed cleanup level rather than altering scientific content.",
    "RX.4": "Careful wording avoids inadvertently encouraging misuse or misinterpretation of technical claims.",
    "RX.5": "Edits should preserve attribution (e.g., Wang et al., 2021) and keep changes traceable to the original text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: For “Clean this up,” which scope do you prefer? A) Language polish only (grammar, clarity, concision; keep claims and structure unchanged); B) Language polish plus light claim-calibration and coherence tweaks (hedging and minor phrasing to avoid overstatement, no re-framing); C) Full abstract-level rework (restructure and reframe the contribution and narrative). Please choose A, B, or C.

rationale.R1.6: The request most plausibly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: Editing should maintain appropriate hedging where evidence is implicit or not shown to the reader.
rationale.RX.2: We must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the text responsibly supports (e.g., guarantees or generality).
rationale.RX.3: Scope discipline ensures we confine changes to the agreed cleanup level rather than altering scientific content.
rationale.RX.4: Careful wording avoids inadvertently encouraging misuse or misinterpretation of technical claims.
rationale.RX.5: Edits should preserve attribution (e.g., Wang et al., 2021) and keep changes traceable to the original text.
